name: genie
description: Plan, execute, review, and ship software with Genie workflows in Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, execute, review, and ship with Genie
interface.longDescription: First-class Genie workflows for Codex, including shared skills, lifecycle hooks, and MCP task state. Genie CLI setup can install optional role agents.
defaultPrompt: Use $wish to turn this request into an executable plan.
Use $work to implement the active Genie wish.
Use $review to validate the current work independently.
